channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T22:29Z — 1627 outages, 143,270 customers, 164 fair-weather, 14 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 13799 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 5396 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 3769 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 3743 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 3597 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
